series_metadata.series_title: OH Natural Gas Consumption Report, Supporting Sched
series_metadata.series_description: Including, but not limited to, application for Natural Gas distribution company (MCF-1), natural gas company tax return (MCF-2), authorization to file and/or pay kilowatt hour tax or MCF taxes via the internet (KWH-6), associated documentation and correspondence. Documents may include printouts, reports, & support documentation contrasting distributor and self assessing purchaser for cross check compliance review.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 4 years after end of calendar year in which the return was filed or the cross check was completed, then destroy ; Electronic: Destroy 4 yrs after end of calendar year in which the return was filed or the cross check was completed, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
